docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR A JUDGE PRO TEM (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY ZIER, TRISTAN MURPHY, KATHRYN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, KATHRYN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF TRISTAN ZIER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KATHRYN MURPHY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY ZIER, TRISTAN AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, KATHRYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $125.00) SERVED APR-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MURPHY, KATHRYN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIER, TRISTAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURPHY, KATHRYN $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $755.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
